content.text: I'll help you review your Mittwald project configuration. Let me start by listing your projects and then getting details on your main project and its apps.

input.description: List Mittwald projects and explore main project
input.prompt:
You have access to Mittwald MCP tools. Your task is to:

1. List all projects using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_list
2. Identify the main/primary project (look for names that stand out)
3. Get detailed information about that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_details with the project ID
4. List all apps in that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_app_list with the project ID

Use these tools in sequence and provide a comprehensive summary of:
- All projects (names, IDs, server info)
- Details of the main project (owner, created date, resources)
- All apps in the main project (names, types, statuses, versions)

Format the response clearly so the user can see their complete project configuration.

content.text:
You have access to Mittwald MCP tools. Your task is to:

1. List all projects using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_list
2. Identify the main/primary project (look for names that stand out)
3. Get detailed information about that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_details with the project ID
4. List all apps in that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_app_list with the project ID

Use these tools in sequence and provide a comprehensive summary of:
- All projects (names, IDs, server info)
- Details of the main project (owner, created date, resources)
- All apps in the main project (names, types, statuses, versions)

Format the response clearly so the user can see their complete project configuration.

tool_use_result:
Error: Exit code 1
error: unknown command 'call'

content.content:
Usage: claude mcp [options] [command]

Configure and manage MCP servers

Options:
  -h, --help                                     Display help for command

Commands:
  serve [options]                                Start the Claude Code MCP server
  add [options] <name> <commandOrUrl> [args...]  Add an MCP server to Claude Code.
  
  Examples:
    # Add HTTP server:
    claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp
  
    # Add SSE server:
    claude mcp add --transport sse asana https://mcp.asana.com/sse
  
    # Add stdio server:
    claude mcp add --transport stdio airtable --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server
  remove [options] <name>                        Remove an MCP server
  list                                           List configured MCP servers
  get <name>                                     Get details about an MCP server
  add-json [options] <name> <json>               Add an MCP server (stdio or SSE) with a JSON string
  add-from-claude-desktop [options]              Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop (Mac and WSL only)
  reset-project-choices                          Reset all approved and rejected project-scoped (.mcp.json) servers within this project
  help [command]                                 display help for command

tool_use_result.stdout:
Usage: claude mcp [options] [command]

Configure and manage MCP servers

Options:
  -h, --help                                     Display help for command

Commands:
  serve [options]                                Start the Claude Code MCP server
  add [options] <name> <commandOrUrl> [args...]  Add an MCP server to Claude Code.
  
  Examples:
    # Add HTTP server:
    claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp
  
    # Add SSE server:
    claude mcp add --transport sse asana https://mcp.asana.com/sse
  
    # Add stdio server:
    claude mcp add --transport stdio airtable --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server
  remove [options] <name>                        Remove an MCP server
  list                                           List configured MCP servers
  get <name>                                     Get details about an MCP server
  add-json [options] <name> <json>               Add an MCP server (stdio or SSE) with a JSON string
  add-from-claude-desktop [options]              Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop (Mac and WSL only)
  reset-project-choices                          Reset all approved and rejected project-scoped (.mcp.json) servers within this project
  help [command]                                 display help for command

tool_use_result.prompt:
You have access to Mittwald MCP tools. Your task is to:

1. List all projects using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_list
2. Identify the main/primary project (look for names that stand out)
3. Get detailed information about that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_details with the project ID
4. List all apps in that project using mcp__mittwald__mittwald_app_list with the project ID

Use these tools in sequence and provide a comprehensive summary of:
- All projects (names, IDs, server info)
- Details of the main project (owner, created date, resources)
- All apps in the main project (names, types, statuses, versions)

Format the response clearly so the user can see their complete project configuration.
